properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - Exploding Damage
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Classic exploding-dice house rule for all 5E damage rolls (weapons and spells): when a damage die rolls its maximum value, it rerolls and adds, repeating if it explodes again. Uses FGU's native compound-explode die mode, no custom reroll logic.

announcement.text: Steadfast5e - Exploding Damage - Version 1.0 by sirkerry
